# BBS Logos and Title Screens

Use this for a board logo, group logo, login screen, or menu centerpiece.

```text
bold retro-computing illustration of [SUBJECT OR MASCOT], centered composition,
strong black outline, chunky geometric shapes, limited 8 to 12 color palette,
high contrast, flat cel shading, simple dark background with large empty areas,
clear silhouette, dramatic but readable at small size, 1980s BBS scene poster
art, no text, no letters, no logo, no watermark
```

For a horizontal title image, add: `wide 16:9 composition, subject placed on the right, open negative space on the left for ANSI lettering`.

For a square badge, add: `square emblem composition, subject fills most of the frame, clean border`.

Use the `bbs-logo.ini` profile as a starting point.
